meta.purpose: Ideas and future work not yet queued. Low commitment, high optionality.
meta.usage: Move items to tasks.json backlog when ready to work on them.

icebox.description: Dedicated PM agent that runs at review thresholds to audit task health
icebox.notes: Should check for stale tasks, missing context, priority drift, orphaned dependencies. Triggered by modification_count crossing a threshold.

icebox.description: Script to render the task DAG as a dependency graph
icebox.notes: Could output DOT format for Graphviz or a simple ASCII tree. Useful for spotting bottlenecks and orphaned chains.
